Who I am

About Me

Rushikesh Khaire
Software Engineer · IIT Bombay, Mumbai

I'm a Full Stack Software Developer with 2+ years of experience building enterprise-grade systems that create real, measurable impact. I care deeply about clean architecture and software that performs at scale.

At Vegayan Systems (IIT Bombay), I've optimized enterprise solutions using Spring Boot 3 and ReactJS — cutting load times by 40% and boosting team efficiency by 31% through smart real-time systems.

Passionate about distributed systems, real-time pipelines, and developer tooling. Strong problem-solver with 600+ DSA problems solved.
